nl_query: Which evaluation policies are currently effective for boards that have at least one script with a pending revaluation request, and show the policy scope, deviation threshold, and review requirement.
failed_sql:
SELECT ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, b.course_id AS board_course_id, b.exam_id AS board_exam_id, b.qp_id AS board_qp_id, b.status AS board_status, b.deadline AS board_deadline, b.deadline_enforcement AS board_deadline_enforcement, b.rate_card_snapshot AS board_rate_card_snapshot, b.version AS board_version, b.created_at AS board_created_at, b.updated_at AS board_updated_at
FROM   evaluation_policy ep
JOIN   board b ON b.id = ep.board_id
JOIN   revaluation_request rr ON rr.board_id = b.id
WHERE  rr.approval_status = 'PENDING'
GROUP BY ep.id, ep.board_id, ep.course_id, ep.deviation_threshold, ep.review_required, b.course_id, b.exam_id, b.qp_id, b.status, b.deadline, b.deadline_enforcement, b.rate_card_snapshot, b.version, b.created_at, b.updated_at
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.updated_at, board.updated_at, revaluation_request.board_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
